dogs.name: BERTRAM
dogs.breed: German Shepherd Dog / Australian Cattle Dog
dogs.description: Meet Oreo — a gentle German Shepherd mix who is looking for a patient family to help him build confidence. Oreo is a sweet, sensitive dog who is still learning that the world isn`t so scary. He can be startled by sudden noises and unfamiliar situations, but he continues to show that he is willing to work through his uncertainty with calm guidance and positive experiences. In play yards, Oreo enjoys exploring his environment and watching the world around him. He has shown appropriate interest in other dogs, greeting politely through a fence and remaining neutral around dogs that were playing nearby. When interactions become too fast or overwhelming, he tends to create distance rather than escalate, suggesting he prefers a slower, more thoughtful approach to social situations.Oreo has been cooperative with handling and veterinary care, allowing restraint, vaccinations, nail trims, and gene

dogs.name: Gordon
dogs.description: Meet Gordon! Gordy came to us during one of the hardest moments of his life. His family, facing heartbreaking circumstances, was told he would be euthanized if surrendered to a local shelter. Desperate to save him, they reached out to rescues — and we said yes. And we are so glad we did. Gordy is young, happy, and full of love. He didn’t deserve to suffer — and despite everything, his gentle heart is still wide open. He’s a sweet, slightly shy boy who has lived peacefully with three small dogs and truly enjoys the company of other pups (he has a soft spot for Chihuahuas!). He’s crate trained, potty trained, and wonderfully well-mannered — the kind of dog who quietly fits into your routine and your heart. Right now, Gordy needs a little extra care. He’s battling severe allergies, a skin infection, and a serious ear infection — one of the toughest we’ve seen. We’re doing everything we can:

dogs.name: Moira
dogs.description: Moira is a rescue from the Bakersfield shelter, July 2025. They labeled her as a greyhound/lab mix. Moira is estimated to be 1 year and is 50 pounds. She is a happy pup! She loves people and other dogs. Moira loves to run and play and enjoys chasing the other dogs in foster care. She knows some basic commands “sit” & “paw”. She is crate trained and house trained. She is a little jumpy and needs more training with this. Moira likes taking walks is good with all she meets. Update: DNA for Moira 50% Doberman Pinscher 26.2% Australian Cattle Dog 15% Siberian Husky 8.8% Border Collie

dogs.name: Okapi
dogs.breed: American Pit Bull Terrier / Australian Cattle Dog
dogs.description: Pupdate: Okapi had surgery on her leg Wednesday. The surgery went very well. Pins were insered in her knee area to correct the growth plate and another broken bone. Her recovery time is approx. 4 to 6 weeks. In 4 weeks, x-rays will be re-taken to see how the bones are healing. We are looking for a temporary foster home to care for Okapi during this time. Okapi is about 4 months old. She is a mix of a Herding breed/Pit Bull who has beaten incredible odds just to be here today. Before arriving from Bakersfield, Okapi and her sister, Panda, were tiny puppies suffering from pneumonia, They watched nearly their entire litter disappear. Four siblings died in the shelter, two more died in foster care, and another was euthanized at the hospital. Against all odds, Okapi and Panda survived. Today, their journey took another heartbreaking turn. Okapi was found to have a severly fractured growth pla

dogs.name: Panda
dogs.breed: American Pit Bull Terrier / Australian Cattle Dog
dogs.description: URGENT Panda & Okapi Need Your Help Panda and Okapi are 3.5 month-old herding breed/Pit Bull mix sisters who have beaten incredible odds just to be here today. Before arriving from Bakersfield they were tiny puppies suffering from pneumonia, they watched nearly their entire litter disappear. Four siblings died in the shelter, two more died in foster care, and another was euthanized at the hospital. Against all odds, Panda and Okapi survived. Panda, the black-and-white sister, is the gentle, shy girl who likes to take her time. Okapi, the tricolored sister, is fearless, affectionate, and never turns down a belly rub or the chance to give kisses. Today, their journey took another heartbreaking turn. Okapi was found to have a broken growth plate in her rear leg and will need surgery to repair it. Once her surgery is complete, Okapi will need a quiet foster home where she can safely recover,

dogs.name: REED
dogs.shelterName: Sonoma County Animal Care and Control

dogs.name: *KATIA
dogs.description: Patience Is Her Love Language Katia is the kind of dog who won`t ask for your heart right away—but with a little patience, she`ll quietly earn it. The shelter has been overwhelming for this sweet girl. When you first meet her, she may try to make herself as small as possible while she figures out if the world is safe. But if you give her a little space and let her move at her own pace, you`ll see her courage begin to shine. Once Katia starts to relax, she reveals a smart and gentle side. She`s very treat motivated and already knows `sit,` `shake,` and `down.` She enjoys exploring the yard, and before long, she begins choosing to come over for snacks, gentle pets, and a little human company. Katia is still learning that new people can be trusted, so she`ll do best with an adopter who respects her boundaries and lets the friendship grow naturally. Quick hand movements near her face, such a
dogs.shelterName: Sacramento County Animal Care (Bradshaw Animal Shelter)

dogs.name: *LAS VEGAS
dogs.description: Las Vegas doesn`t believe in doing anything halfway—especially when it comes to fetch. This handsome Cattle Dog is all business once the ball comes out, locking onto his mission with the laser focus and determination the breed is famous for. The best part? He`s happy to hand the toy right back because, to him, the greatest reward is watching you throw it again. This playful, intelligent boy is looking for a home that appreciates everything that makes Cattle Dogs so special. He`s active, eager to engage, and happiest when he has a job to do. Whether it`s a game of fetch, learning new skills, or joining you on outdoor adventures, Las Vegas is ready to be your enthusiastic partner. Like many of his breed, his affection is genuine but practical. He`ll happily spend time with his people, but don`t expect a couch potato—this guy would much rather be interacting, playing, and sharing life`s adv
dogs.shelterName: Sacramento County Animal Care (Bradshaw Animal Shelter)

dogs.name: Koda
dogs.breed: Australian Cattle Dog / German Shepherd Dog
dogs.description: Walks and fetch - please!! This is what he lives for! Koda would be GREAT in a 1-2 person home with someone who works from home with no kids. He gets very anxious about staying alone and always likes to be with his person. He s 69 pounds of love and brilliance and enjoys riding in the car for any amount of time, long walks, fetch and swimming in the river. He has trouble getting shots at the vet and so we are overdue. Koda has had 5 week behavioral training at Ridgeside K-9 in April 2025 and is a quick learner. He really lives for playing fetch with a stick or a ball but gets snippy with the vet and getting put into his crate

dogs.name: Lola
dogs.description: It was a gift I was planning to take it to Mexico but plans changed and I was unable to make the trip, she is the best puppy she is very active and she know commands like sit, spin, jump, crate and wait. She is 8 weeks but unfortunately I cannot longer have her in my apartment. I’m trying to find her a home that will take care of her and will seek for her too. :)

dogs.name: SERGIO
dogs.description: Meet Sergio—the fun-sized package with a heart that`s just waiting for the right person to unlock it. This adorable cattle dog mix is a rock star in playgroups! He`s social, respectful, and loves a good wrestling match with his canine buddies. Whether he`s romping around the yard or making new four-legged friends, Sergio knows how to have a good time. People, though? That`s where Sergio is still finding his confidence.The shelter can be a scary place, and Sergio is learning every day that humans can be kind. Thanks to patient staff and dedicated volunteers, he`s making progress and slowly discovering that treats, gentle words, and caring hands aren`t so bad after all. We believe the day Sergio truly trusts someone will be the day they gain a loyal best friend for life. You`ll be part of his inner circle—a place reserved for the people who earn his heart. Sergio isn`t looking for perfecti
